title: spathyema foetida f. latissima
intro: Spathyema foetida f. latissima, also known as the stinking iris or the stinking flag, is a plant species in the family Iridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Spathyema foetida f. latissima include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antispasmodic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
